landing.title: Learn from any lecture — in the language you think in.
landing.subtitle: EduCaption adds synced subtitles and study materials to Echo360, Coursera, Udemy, and YouTube. Because English shouldn't decide who gets to learn.
landing.problem: Most of the best coursework on the internet is in English. For millions of learners across Southeast Asia, that is a wall — not a ladder.

steps.title: Open a lecture
steps.desc: Drop into Echo360, Coursera, Udemy, or YouTube. The extension finds the video player and its transcript.

steps.title: Pick a language
steps.desc: Thai, Chinese, Vietnamese, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, and more. Translations happen in the background.

steps.title: Study alongside
steps.desc: Bilingual subtitles stay in sync with playback. Generate a summary, quiz, or vocabulary list whenever you need one.

landing.closingBody: EduCaption is a small project with a narrow job: keep the subtitles honest, keep the study material useful, and get out of the way.
landing.footerRight: A student project for the WSTI Hackathon, 2026.

home.subtitle: Pick up where you left off, or add a new lecture.
home.emptySubtitle: Add your first lecture to get started.

addPanel.title: Add a new lecture
addPanel.description: Paste a YouTube URL and pick your language.
addPanel.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid YouTube URL.
